text:
The is a town located on the south edge of Wall Sina.

Story

Clash of the Titans arc

A group including Eren Jaeger, Armin Arlelt, Hange Zoë, and Pastor Nick passes through Ehrmich District on their way to investigate the appearance of Titans within Wall Rose. Due to the assumption that Wall Rose has been breached, the district is filled with refugees trying to evacuate to Wall Sina.
